headline: 影视圈新片扎堆，暑期档热度攀升
headlineEn: New Films Flock to Summer Box Office
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等热门影片领跑趋势。多部续集与衍生作品蓄势待发，行业关注度持续走高。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but trending hits like 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3' lead the week. Sequels and spin-offs are on the rise, boosting industry buzz.

industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' sets release date

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》预告即将发布
